summary: Mercedes enters the Austrian weekend with momentum, as Kimi Antonelli's first-practice pace edges out teammate George Russell in a commanding show of speed at a circuit that demands precision. The extreme heat declared as a race hazard will test tire management and driver endurance, potentially favoring teams with superior cooling strategies and creating opportunities for tactical gambles throughout the field. A strong result here could reshape the championship momentum as teams jostle for position in the midseason battle, with every point magnified by the unpredictable conditions.
